events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the alignment was accepted before final piping tie-in, so pipe strain from the suction/discharge (SEQ/TRD) connections could pull the shaft out of tolerance undetected — a sequencing defect per API 686, which requires alignment be finalized only after piping is fully made up. Marked as `fail` / `high` risk with corrective actions to re-check pipe strain and re-shoot alignment after final bolt-up.
